content: The existing Self-Refine framework for LLM code refinement can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision. This hybrid framework outperforms vanilla single-perspective Self-Refine by catching blind spots that a single self-feedback pass would miss, while still avoiding the data and compute overhead of supervised refinement methods.
